title: Workhorse Group Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Q3 2023 Financial Results

Report Date: November 14, 2023

Quarter Ended: September 30, 2023

Key Financial Metrics

Sales (net): $3.0 million (Q3 2023) vs. $1.5 million (Q3 2022). Cost of Sales: $6.6 million vs. $9.5 million. Gross Loss: $(3.5) million vs. $(8.0) million. SG&A Expenses: $11.8 million vs. $34.8 million. R&D Expenses: $5.8 million vs. $6.1 million. Net Loss: $(30.6) million vs. $(35.4) million. Loss per Share: $(0.14) vs. $(0.22).

Balance Sheet Highlights (as of Sept. 30, 2023)

Cash: $38.9 million. Total Current Assets: $97.8 million. Total Assets: $146.3 million. Working Capital: $71.9 million. Total Stockholders' Equity: $112.8 million.

Full Year 2023 Guidance

CEO Rick Dauch stated: our ability to deliver W4 CCs and W750s during the quarter was severely compromised by California incentive voucher delays, which were subsequently resolved on November 8.

Revised 2023 Revenue Guidance: $10–$15 million.
